package rulecoverage

func NegativeMissingCancelCall() string {
    ruleID := "missing_cancel_call"
    family := "context"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Derived contexts where deslop cannot find a local cancel() or defer cancel() call."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
